title: Run public push hygiene gate for TraceWeaver branch
description: Before pushing the squashed TraceWeaver branch to any remote, scan the one-commit diff for private repo/path/archive leakage, priority-doc references, raw extraction outputs, and standards-derived/licensed-source exposure. Do not push unless clean or explicitly approved after risks are listed.
acceptance_criteria: Commit history is one feature commit on local main; scans identify any private/private-source/licensed-source exposure; decision is recorded; no remote push occurs unless clean.

acceptance_criteria: The active compound-engineering ce-doc-review SKILL.md path is identified; the missing advertised path or alias issue is explained; local configuration or aliasing is repaired if safe; a verification command proves the skill file can be found from the expected entry point; no unrelated plugin/cache files are modified.
close_reason: Added local ce-doc-review alias that dynamically resolves the latest installed Compound Engineering plugin cache version; verified dynamic latest-version resolution without pinning a cache version.
